name: Herman Miller Aeron Chair
context: Flexible back and twin lumbar support offers continuous back support. Configurable builds: Multiple frame finishes, lumbar options, and size variants are available.

name: Nouhaus Ergo3D Mesh Chair
context: Durable rollerblade-style casters provide smooth movement across floors. Perfect 135° backrest recline relieves spinal pressure.
recommendations: Best Office Chair for Back and Neck Pain

name: Herman Miller Embody Chair
context: Excellent build quality. Gorgeous Pixelated backrest design.

name: Sidiz T80 Chair
use_case: Runner’s Up for Best Office Chair
context: Ships with a well-padded neck rest that stays in position during use. Features forward seat tilt and a four-step tilt mechanism to help maintain lumbar curve and reduce back pressure.
recommendations: Runner’s Up for Best Office Chair

name: myCentric Office Chair
context: Made in Canada, ensuring quality manufacturing standards. Highly customizable with multiple seat sizes, arm options, and upholstery choices.
